progress_summary: Follow-up to the Option C v3 live port: CI Lighthouse flagged a color-contrast regression on the active tab-count pill (accent/info text on the faint *-dim tint failed AA at 9.5px; /changelog a11y dropped 1.00→0.97). Fix: the active count pill keeps the tint + coloured border but uses --text for the label (AA on any themed bg). Re-validated: `astro build` 35 pages OK, anti-pattern + secret scan clean on changelog.astro (CSS-only change; no TS touched, prior `astro check` was 0 errors). Browser e2e + Lighthouse re-check run in CI (chromium CDN blocked in this sandbox).
next_actions: Auto-merge enabled on PR #265 — merges when CI is green (Playwright e2e + Lighthouse a11y back to 1.00). Watch the changelog e2e + a11y budget.
On merge to main, deploy is manual: npm run deploy:staging, eyeball staging.opchain.dev/changelog, then npm run deploy.
